worst_messages.speaker: agent
worst_messages.text: Okay. Okay. We have a few ways we can approach this. One option is to look at restructuring your loan to give you more time to pay, which could temporarily lower your monthly amount. Another is to see if we can settle for a reduced amount by waiving some of the penalty charges. And a third option could be to explore a temporary hold on payments, though that's usually for a shorter duration. Which of these sounds most interesting to you right now?
worst_messages.reason: negotiation_quality: Agent offered loan restructuring and temporary hold on payments.
